privileged_info_summary: The task involves Docker network segmentation of 6 microservices (acme-proxy, acme-api, acme-users, acme-orders, acme-db, acme-cache) in the AcmeCorp platform located at /home/ga/projects/acme-platform. The initial deployment uses a single flat network called 'acme-flat' which must be replaced with three segmented networks: 'dmz-net' (for proxy and api), 'app-net' (for api, users, and orders), and 'data-net' (for users, orders, db, and cache). The architecture must be documented in /home/ga/Desktop/network_architecture.txt.
